title: kennedia coccinea var. sericea
intro: Kennedia coccinea var. sericea is a variety of the Scarlet Runner bean plant, a flowering legume native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues, fever, and skin problems. The health benefits of Kennedia coccinea var. sericea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
